data.content: Implemented API documentation: OpenAPI 3.1.0 spec served at GET /api/openapi.json (src/lib/openapi/ modular spec + src/app/api/openapi.json/route.ts), human-readable API guide at docs/API.md with domain overview, SSE streaming guide, and 6 workflow recipes for agent automation. Updated docs/MANIFEST.md to replace 190 lines of outdated inline API reference with a summary table linking to canonical docs. All 33+ API endpoints documented. Quality gates: typecheck clean, 1702 tests pass. Commit 79461d2 pushed to origin/main.
